message.content: {"analysis":"The autotune is too slow (3 hours ETA). The issue is that autotune is likely trying character n-grams which are extremely slow. I need to kill this and try a manual approach with carefully tuned parameters.","plan":"1. Kill current process. 2. Try manual training with carefully chosen parameters focusing on: higher learning rates, wordNgrams=2-3, appropriate dimensions, and better text preprocessing. Skip character n-grams entirely. 3. Multiple quick experiments.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":2.0}]}
